questions.q: Which kubeadm command is used to inspect the expiration dates of all control plane certificates?
questions.explanation: The 'kubeadm certs check-expiration' command scans the certificates in '/etc/kubernetes/pki' and '/etc/kubernetes/*.conf' files, reporting their remaining validity period.

questions.q: What is the standard path to the primary Kubernetes Root CA (Certificate Authority) certificate inside a kubeadm-provisioned control plane node?
questions.explanation: In a cluster managed by kubeadm, all key PKI infrastructure is stored in '/etc/kubernetes/pki/'. The Root CA is stored at '/etc/kubernetes/pki/ca.crt'.
